name: solana-coralos
description: OmniQuantAI CoralOS marketplace: specialist financial research agents compete, deliver intelligence, and settle through Solana devnet escrow.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/agent-runtime && npm run typecheck --prefix coral-agents/buyer-agent && npm run typecheck --prefix coral-agents/seller-agent && npm run typecheck --prefix examples/marketplace && npm run typecheck --prefix examples/marketplace/feed && npm run typecheck --prefix examples/marketplace/web
scripts.test: npm test --prefix packages/agent-runtime && npm test --prefix coral-agents/buyer-agent && npm test --prefix coral-agents/seller-agent && npm test --prefix examples/marketplace/feed && npm test --prefix examples/marketplace/web
scripts.production-check: npm run health && npm run typecheck && npm test
